name: Role & permission policy — frontend UI affordances
description: Surface permission-aware UI so members only see actions they are allowed to perform. Frontend: a usePermission(action) hook that reads the current user's role from household context and returns a boolean, used to show/hide/disable action buttons across household settings, member management, expense edit/delete, and group management pages. Includes a PermissionGate component for declarative gating. Per docs/product-specs/role-permission.md. Backend enforcement (feat-015a) must already be in place — this feat adds defence-in-depth UX only.
